## AI Review Checklist

- [ ] Latest docs checked where relevant
- [ ] Specific latest docs consulted are listed in this PR body
- [ ] Local versions/manifests inspected first
- [ ] Contract/schema impact called out above
- [ ] Generated code, if any, is labeled and reviewed
- [ ] Specs, ADRs, RFCs, or evals updated when required
- [ ] No secrets or unsafe placeholders introduced
